Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory data for every part number on the weekly backorder report, capturing on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit shipment details.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enriches the backorder report with real-time fulfillment context in one automated pass, replacing the dozen-person manual lookup process that currently consumes significant team hours each week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the existing backorder report structure, flags parts with no on-hand, no open orders, and no in-transit source as dead-end items requiring escalation.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Produces an enriched, prioritized report that immediately identifies the highest-risk backorders, so the team focuses energy on real problems rather than parts already on their way.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer-facing communications for backordered items, including status updates and estimated resolution timelines, ready for review or auto-send.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates the manual drafting of customer update emails across the team, ensuring consistent, timely communication while freeing staff to focus on resolution rather than outreach.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all make, model, and year fitment data for their two-piece rotor product lines.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitor fitment reference in minutes that would take days to compile manually, ensuring no coverage gaps are missed.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify which applications DFC already covers and which represent gaps or new opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly maps the competitive landscape against DFC's own catalog, giving Dino a data-driven view of where to expand the product line for maximum market impact.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to relevant customers or prospects to gather demand signals for fitments that DFC does not currently stock.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Turns the gap analysis into active market research automatically, collecting real demand data that validates which new parts are worth sourcing before committing inventory investment.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles the full output — scraped fitment data, DFC cross-reference results, gap analysis, and customer response tracking — into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino one clean, decision-ready document that consolidates competitive research, inventory gaps, and real demand signals, making product expansion planning fast and evidence-based.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields — headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — for specific flagged phrases or terms defined by the user.
Meta Investigation.impact: Audits the entire live ad library in moments, catching compliance risks or off-brand messaging that would be nearly impossible to find manually across dozens of active ads.

Meta Investigation.action: Reviews each phrase match in context to confirm true positives, filters out false matches, and structures the findings into a clean flagged list with the exact field and copy excerpt for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Eliminates noise from raw keyword matches and delivers a precise, context-aware report, so the team acts on real issues rather than chasing false alarms.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted email listing every confirmed flagged ad with the platform, campaign, ad name, specific copy field, and the exact phrase match highlighted for immediate review.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a complete, actionable findings report in the right person's inbox on demand, enabling fast remediation of compliance or brand issues before they scale further.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Pulls live performance data and ad copy from all active Meta and TikTok campaigns, making it available as context for conversational queries.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Gives the chatbot a real-time, cross-platform view of paid channel performance so answers are grounded in current data rather than static exports.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Interprets natural language questions about paid channel performance and responds with data-backed answers, comparisons, and recommendations drawn from the live ad data.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Lets any team member instantly query paid media performance in plain English, removing the bottleneck of waiting for a analyst to pull and interpret reports.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and applicant details, and routes each submission into the workflow.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures zero applications are missed or left sitting in a shared inbox, creating a reliable, automatic intake process that handles any volume of submissions.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each incoming resume PDF to an organized Drive folder structure, making all applicant files accessible and searchable in a central location.
Resume Bot.impact: Eliminates scattered resume files across inboxes and local drives, giving the hiring team a clean, permanent record of every candidate without manual filing.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume and scores the candidate against the requirements of open roles, producing a hire/deny/pause decision with a rationale summary for each applicant.
Resume Bot.impact: Replaces hours of initial resume screening with instant, consistent scoring, letting the hiring team focus their attention only on candidates who genuinely fit the role.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every applicant's name, role, score, decision, and Drive file link to a master dashboard, with denied and approved candidates in main tabs and paused candidates held in a dedicated Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a real-time hiring pipeline dashboard that gives the team complete visibility into every candidate's status without digging through emails or folders.

summary: The pipeline is running strong with 56 total agents — 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week. We did have one agent cross the finish line: the Paid Channel Chatbot moved to Completed, giving the team an on-demand tool to quickly query paid channel performance. Great work to everyone pushing the pipeline forward — steady progress across the board!
